audit: Repo Agentic Audit & Improvement Plan v2

repo.name: topfarms
repo.type: SPA web app (two-sided NZ farm-jobs marketplace) + Supabase backend

typecheck.result: FAIL exit 2, 29 errors (mostly TS6133 unused; 1 real TS2322 EmployerOnboarding.tsx:227)

lint.result: BROKEN — ESLint 9 installed, no eslint.config.* exists anywhere

tests.result: PASS — 390 passed, 0 failed, 114 todo, 6 skipped files, 12.8s; React act() warnings in SavedSearchesDropdown tests

build.result: PASS 2.4s — single JS chunk 1385.79 kB (383.17 kB gzip); Vite chunk-size warning; build does NOT run tsc

npm_audit.result: 8 vulns (1 critical [vitest, dev-only], 4 high, 3 moderate); prod-relevant: react-router 7.5.0 (high: open redirect GHSA-2j2x-hqr9-3h42, DoS), ws 8.x (moderate, transitive). All fixable via npm audit fix

tool_runs.supabase_advisors_security: 70 lints: 32 anon-executable SECURITY DEFINER fns, 32 authenticated-executable, function_search_path_mutable on get_platform_stats, leaked-password protection OFF, employer-photos bucket listable, 3 tables RLS-no-policy (deny-by-default)

Stripe webhook: signature verification + idempotency guard (stripe-webhook/index.ts)
Secret hygiene: clean scans, .env untracked + documented .env.example

not_fixing: 24 unused indexes — data volume near zero; revisit post-liquidity

RLS-enabled-no-policy on admin_audit_log etc. — deny-by-default is intentional (RPC-only access)
